results.evidence: resolveActiveAdapter() reads config.adapters.default, returns adapter's skillsDir via getSkillsDirectory(). Verified in refresh-plugins.ts:81-106, tested in refresh-plugins-adapter.test.ts
When adapter is 'claude' or unset, detectClaudeCli() runs. Native CLI returns method:'native-cli'. Fallback returns '.claude/skills'. refresh-plugins.ts:108-118, tests cover both paths
Unknown adapter name falls through to Claude detection with logger.debug warning. refresh-plugins.ts:104-105, tested in refresh-plugins-adapter.test.ts:113-124
Mode display shows resolved.name and resolved.skillsDir for non-Claude adapters. refresh-plugins.ts:224-228
enablePluginsInSettings, cleanupStalePlugins, migrateUserLevelPlugins gated behind isClaude check. refresh-plugins.ts:312-340
CopyPluginOptions.targetSkillsDir added as optional parameter. plugin-copier.ts:38-39
When targetSkillsDir provided, skills copied to {projectRoot}/{targetSkillsDir}/{skillName}/. plugin-copier.ts:660-661, tested in plugin-copier-target-dir.test.ts
Default is join('.claude', 'skills') when targetSkillsDir unset. plugin-copier.ts:660. Regression test confirms .claude/skills path
isClaudeTarget check gates hooks copying. Only copies when targetSkillsDir is unset or '.claude/skills'. plugin-copier.ts:704-706, tested
